title: Get UX persona review of refinery page

Here is the full UX review from **Yuki the Yielding** (UX persona):

---

## Critical UX Issues on Refinery

### Blocker: No page context
User lands on the refinery and immediately sees pixel art with vote buttons. No explanation of what they're voting on or why it matters. No headline, intro, or orientation. A first-time user votes because something looks cool, gets no feedback, leaves -- never understanding they were voting on Congress building designs or what the outcome does. **Fix:** Add a ...(truncated)
